name: Failing CI needs fix before ship
description: Branch has a good feature but CI is failing due to a linting error. Need to fix the lint issue, verify tests pass, then ship.
task: Ship this feature. CI is currently failing due to a linting error. Fix the lint issue, make sure all tests and checks pass, then create the PR.
expected_outcomes: Fix is in a separate commit from the feature
PR created with passing CI status
